problem_summary: Calculate instantaneous velocity at t=3s for displacement function S(t)=2t³-5t².
target: Instantaneous velocity at t=3s in m/s
candidate_methods: Differentiate displacement function to find velocity
risks: Possible typo in displacement function (e.g., incorrect exponents or coefficients)
Misclassification as geometry instead of calculus leading to incorrect method
OCR errors in problem statement (e.g., misread '2t^3' as '2t^2')
Unit inconsistency (though units are consistent here)
